name: Geriatric BMI Calculator
description: Calculate BMI for older adults and see recommended ranges for healthy aging.
formulaDescription: BMI is a simple tool; for older adults, slightly higher BMI ranges are often healthier.

example.explanation: For older adults, a BMI range of 22-27 is often considered healthy.

faqs.question: Is BMI the same for older adults?
faqs.answer: BMI is a general guide; slightly higher values can be healthier for older adults.
